source_artifacts.label: Scenario fixture
source_artifacts.note: The page hydrates from this JSON.

source_artifacts.label: Assessment example
source_artifacts.note: One assessment output used as an inspectable reference.

source_artifacts.label: Export script
source_artifacts.note: Builds the fixture inputs from repository state.

stages.meaning: Continuum starts from concrete working state: a repository, authored artifacts, and an identified agent rather than a timeless process.
stages.summary: The agent is operating normally inside an active repository session with current identity, task, and revision surfaces in place.
stages.title: Active session

stages.meaning: The aim is not to keep one process alive forever. The aim is to preserve enough evidence that a later session can be judged continuous.
stages.summary: A memory checkpoint is created before interruption, preserving enough local continuity surface for later reconstruction.
stages.title: Checkpoint recorded

stages.meaning: Continuum records the break instead of pretending it never happened. That explicit break becomes something later assessment can inspect.
stages.summary: A migration declaration records that a prior session ended and a new session is attempting to continue the same lineage.
stages.title: Restart declared

stages.meaning: Continuity is judged, not presumed. It depends on recoverable evidence and stable responsibility constraints.
stages.summary: Continuity assessment re-reads the repository bundle and migration evidence to judge whether the restarted session still qualifies as the same agent.
stages.title: Assessment refresh

stages.meaning: Session death does not have to collapse identity. What matters is whether a restarted session can satisfy public continuity conditions.
stages.summary: The restarted session is recognized as the same agent with high confidence and ready recognition status.
stages.title: Same agent recognized

summary: A repository-local agent records a handoff checkpoint, declares a restarted session, and is re-recognized as the same agent through continuity assessment.
title: Session restart continuity
